title: PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd!
